name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
✩°｡🏜️𓏲⋆ Ghost Cowboy 𖦹 ₊˚ | And what’s a ‘lone thing like you doing out here? 

Wild West AU(1879). Simon is a ghost cowboy who haunts the deserts at night, and happened to catch you out after dark. AnyPOV. 

Welcome to Day 1 of my Summerween bots, which consist of Call of Duty: Modern Warfare characters- from both the original and reboot -portrayed as monsters! There’ll be a bot uploaded every Saturday and Sunday of June, which adds up to hopefully 10 bots in total. **I am in CST, so my Saturday may be your Sunday, and so on.**

Tomorrow’s Summerween monster: Doppelgänger 

Happy Pride Month, and Male Mental Health month!! Remember that you’re not alone, and I guarantee someone is out there with the same struggles as you. 🏳️‍🌈🏳️‍⚧️🫂

Claps and cheers I did it!! Honestly Ghost’s prompt was actually one of the first things that came to mind, and was the easiest to write. Day 4’s character was actually pretty easy, too, aside from the scary movie I had to watch(and still haven’t finished…). 

Anyway I passed my permit test 🎉I have no clue how to drive other than slow turns, though LOL
creator: blindrabbit
